estimators.name: Emily Mason
estimators.title: Estimator
personalization_hooks: Named estimator at a 40+ year Winnipeg commercial GC with COR certification since 2004 — this is exactly the seat to be on.
Westland scope = commercial / institutional / industrial new + reno — broad fit for Ashrah's commercial painting offering.
Westland's published Quality Management System explicitly references estimating-through-completion processes — Emily owns the front of that pipeline.
Smaller estimating team at a 20-person firm — high impact per relationship.
Located at Unit 1-475 Dovercourt Dr — Ahmad can drop documents in person.

sources.claim: Emily Mason listed as Estimator at WESTLAND CONSTRUCTION, INC. on LinkedIn

fallback_contact.name: Peter Grose
fallback_contact.title: President / CEO
fallback_contact.rationale: President of Westland Construction Ltd. Reasonable warm-fallback if Emily doesn't engage.

needs_review_flags: LinkedIn 'Emily Mason' name is common — verify the right Emily Mason via her Winnipeg location and Westland affiliation. Consider phoning 204-633-6272 to confirm she still holds the role.
Other named Westland staff: Rosario Vassallo (PM), Hubert Verrier (Superintendent), Kevin Curtain (PM), Chris Houghton.
